outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: A teetering ceasefire bodes ill for treacherous US-Iran talks ahead
outlets.summary: CNN analysis warns ceasefire is fraying — Lebanon excluded, Hormuz still closed, and Islamabad talks face major obstacles.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth's claims about Iran war contradict reality, officials say
outlets.summary: Multiple officials dispute Hegseth's 'decisive victory' narrative — Hormuz blocked, Lebanon escalating, enrichment unresolved.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump vows 'positive action' as ceasefire agreement with Iran reached
outlets.summary: Fox News frames ceasefire as Trump diplomatic win — 'positive action' promised as Islamabad talks approach.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump warns strikes will resume if Iran doesn't agree to his terms
outlets.summary: NPR covers Hegseth's victory declaration and Trump's warnings about ceasefire conditions.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 42 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera's Day 42 overview — Mojtaba declares victory, Lebanon mourning day, Hormuz still closed, Islamabad talks Saturday.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Israel attacks Lebanon as ceasefire was declared
outlets.summary: BBC reports continued Israeli strikes on Lebanon despite US-Iran ceasefire — 303 killed in single day.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF launches largest airstrikes yet on Hezbollah; Trump: Iran truce doesn't cover Lebanon
outlets.summary: Israel's Operation Eternal Darkness — largest single-day strikes on Hezbollah. Lebanon ceasefire explicitly excluded from Iran deal.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF 98th Division captures nearly all of Bint Jbeil
outlets.summary: JPost reports on IDF ground operations in southern Lebanon.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Former FM Kharazi dies from US-Israeli strike wounds; Supreme Leader calls Iranians 'definitive victors'
outlets.summary: Iranian media mourns Kharazi death, highlights Mojtaba Khamenei's written statement calling Iranians 'definitive victors' and demanding compensation.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Former FM Kharazi dies from US-Israeli strike wounds; Supreme Leader calls Iranians 'definitive victors'
outlets.summary: Iranian media mourns Kharazi death, highlights Mojtaba Khamenei's written statement calling Iranians 'definitive victors' and demanding compensation.
